{1} 個引用來源，已完成桶級映射。: {1} citation sources with bucket-level mapping complete.
{1}，負責接收任務、調用知識庫、執行 SOP 並沉澱對話質量反饋。: {1} handles incoming tasks, queries the knowledge base, executes SOPs, and retains conversation-quality feedback.
」，用於驗證員工實際可用的工具返回。: ", used to verify the tool response that is actually available to the employee.
# 技能說明 在這裡編寫技能文檔。名稱、Slug 和描述由上方表單維護，系統不會: # Skill Description Write the skill documentation here. Name, Slug, and description are managed in the form above and are not extracted from this document.
按目錄結構組織知識範圍，先看主題，再進入知識圖譜。: Organize the knowledge scope by directory: review topics first, then open the knowledge graph.
按相關性選擇知識庫文檔: Select Knowledge Base Documents by Relevance
把瀏覽器、查詢、文檔處理、MCP 或項目工作流沉澱為技能，讓能力能被多個員工複用: Package browser, query, document-processing, MCP, and project workflows as skills that multiple employees can reuse and improve.
把業務文檔沉澱為知識庫，把關鍵流程拆成節點、必填信息、允許動作和回覆規則。: Capture business documents in knowledge bases and break key workflows into nodes, required information, allowed actions, and response rules.
把用戶偏好、項目背景、復盤結論和協作習慣沉澱為可查記錄，幫助後續會話繼承已驗證的: Retain user preferences, project context, review conclusions, and collaboration habits as searchable records so future conversations can inherit verified context.
把制度、交付文檔和服務規範沉澱為知識庫，再用引用和反饋持續修正口徑。: Capture policies, delivery documents, and service standards in a knowledge base, then refine them continuously with citations and feedback.
把制度、商品、交付和服務口徑解析為可檢索片段，回覆時保留引用線索，降低“聽起來對: Parse policies, product, delivery, and service standards into searchable chunks, preserving citation trails in replies so answers remain verifiable.
保存後不可修改名稱。: After saving, cannot be changed Name.
保存後到點會拉起一個新的執行記錄，並交給當前員工按 SOP、技能、資料和工具執行: At the scheduled time, a new execution record is created and assigned to the current employee using its SOPs, skills, knowledge, and tools.
保存後可選擇並測試: After saving, can Select and Test
保存數字員工檔案失敗: Failed to save digital employee profile
保留切片內容、原文片段和來源路徑，用於回答溯源。: Keep chunk content, source excerpts, and source paths for answer traceability.
本次響應連接中斷，未能確認服務端會話。請重試發送。: The connection was interrupted and the server session could not be confirmed. Please send again.
本次響應同步超時，請重試發送。: Response synchronization timed out. Please send again.
必要時轉人工: Hand Off to a Human When Needed
編輯內部索引與引用來源: Edit Internal Index and Citation Sources
不是通用 Agent 框架，而是面向業務流程的企業對話運行時: An enterprise conversation runtime for business workflows, not a generic agent framework.
不要只用標準話術測試，要用用戶真實表達覆蓋缺信息、信息已給全、改口、插話和轉人工: Test with real user language, including missing information, complete information, corrections, interruptions, and human handoff, not just standard scripts.
部分對話日誌數據加載失敗: Failed to load some conversation logs data
測試參數 JSON（拼到 URL Query）: Test Parameter JSON (appended to the URL query)
測試參數 JSON（作為請求 Body）: Test Parameter JSON (sent as the request body)
測試參數不是合法 JSON: Test parameters are not valid JSON
創建你的第一位數字員工，為它配置知識庫、技能與工具，即可開始接管對話與任務。: Create your first digital employee and configure its knowledge, skills, and tools to start handling conversations and tasks.
從當前員工移除後，工具廣場中的原始工具不會被刪除。: Removing this tool from the current employee does not delete the original tool from the Tool Marketplace.
從廣場複製到當前數字員工的 SOP。: Copy an SOP from the Marketplace to the current digital employee.
從廣場複製到當前數字員工的技能。: Copy a skill from the Marketplace to the current digital employee.
從廣場複製到當前數字員工的知識庫。: Copy a knowledge base from the Marketplace to the current digital employee.
從開放廣場複製可用 SOP；不可複製內容不會出現在列表。: Copy an available SOP from the Marketplace. Items that cannot be copied are hidden.
從開放廣場複製可用工具；複製後會成為當前員工的本地工具綁定。: Copy an available tool from the Marketplace and bind it locally to the current employee.
從開放廣場複製可用技能；不會覆蓋當前編輯區內容。: Copy an available skill from the Marketplace without overwriting the current editor content.
從開放廣場複製可用技能；不可複製內容不會出現在列表。: Copy an available skill from the Marketplace. Items that cannot be copied are hidden.
從開放廣場複製可用知識庫；不可複製內容不會出現在列表。: Copy an available knowledge base from the Marketplace. Items that cannot be copied are hidden.
從開源平臺導入失敗: Failed to Import from Open-Source Platform
從空白開始創建，不繼承任何已有配置。: Start from scratch without inheriting any existing configuration.
從空系統到一個可復盤員工: From an Empty System to a Reviewable Employee
從數字員工複製 SOP: Copy SOP from a digital employee
從數字員工複製工具: Copy tools from a digital employee
從數字員工複製技能: Copy skills from a digital employee
從數字員工複製可用 SOP；不可見內容不會出現在列表。: Copy an available SOP from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
從數字員工複製可用工具；不可見內容不會出現在列表。: Copy an available tool from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
從數字員工複製可用技能；不會覆蓋當前編輯區內容。: Copy an available skill from another digital employee without overwriting the current editor content.
從數字員工複製可用技能；不可見內容不會出現在列表。: Copy an available skill from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
從數字員工複製可用知識庫；不可見內容不會出現在列表。: Copy an available knowledge base from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
從數字員工複製知識庫: Copy knowledge base from a digital employee
從用戶消息到最終回覆，中間的每一步都應該能在日誌和 Trace 中找到證據。: Every step from user message to final reply should have evidence in logs and Trace.
大多數問題可以落到模型、知識、SOP、工具、權限和 Trace 六個層面定位。: Most issues can be diagnosed across six layers: model, knowledge, SOP, tools, permissions, and Trace.
代表引用來源，可在詳情中查看來源映射。: Representative citation source. Open Details to view the source mapping.
當前 SOP 將切換為「{1}」的 {2} 版本內容，歷史對話和反饋數據不會被刪: The current SOP will switch to the {2} version of “{1}”. Conversation history and feedback data will not be deleted.
當前倉庫由後端服務、企業端控制台和對話端組成。企業端負責配置，對話端負責使用，後: This repository contains the backend service, enterprise console, and chat experience. The console configures, chat consumes, and the backend runs conversations, knowledge, tools, and tasks.
當前工具配置中暫無描述: No description for the current tool configuration
當前還沒有可管理的數字員工，創建一位或從開放廣場複製已發佈的配置作為起點。: There are no manageable digital employees yet. Create one or copy a published Marketplace configuration.
當前技能沒有未保存變更，確認清空當前改寫內容和對話記錄？: There are no unsaved skill changes. Clear the current rewrite and conversation history?
當前節點是終止節點，默認流程結束。: This is a terminal node; the flow ends here by default.
當前瀏覽器不支持流式響應: This browser does not support streaming responses.
當前瀏覽器無法處理頭像圖片: This browser cannot process avatar images.
當前沒有內容變化，無需保存草稿。: There are no changes to save as a draft.
當前員工下你的長期記憶: Your Long-term Memory for the Current Employee
當前員工暫無本地 SOP: No local SOPs for the current employee.
當前員工暫無工具: No tools for the current employee.
當前員工暫無技能: No skills for the current employee.
當前員工暫無用戶記憶；新的對話記憶會按員工和用戶隔離沉澱。: This employee has no user memory yet. New conversation memories are retained separately by employee and user.
當前員工暫無知識庫: No knowledge bases for the current employee.
當前租戶下你的長期記憶: Your Long-term Memory for the Current Tenant
導出知識庫備份包失敗: Failed to export the knowledge base backup.
導入後會生成知識圖譜、知識索引和引用來源。: Importing generates a knowledge graph, knowledge indexes, and citation sources.
導入新技能前是否保存當前技能？: Save the current skill before importing a new one?
導入知識庫備份包失敗: Failed to import the knowledge base backup.
點擊「發現工具」後，這裡會列出該 MCP Server 提供的工具。: Click “Discover Tools” to list tools provided by this MCP Server.
點擊「發現工具」拉取 tools/list，勾選後「導入/同步」即可生成工具行。: Click “Discover Tools” to fetch tools/list, select tools, then choose “Import / Sync” to create tool entries.
點擊調用後，這裡會顯示工具返回、錯誤信息和原始 data。: After calling the tool, its response, errors, and raw data appear here.
點擊左下角「新建數字員工」開始創建，或前往員工廣場選擇已發佈的員工。: Click “New Digital Employee” in the lower-left corner, or choose a published employee from the Employee Marketplace.
調整篩選條件，或換個關鍵詞再試試: Adjust the filters or try another keyword.
定時任務 -> 運行記錄 -> 記憶沉澱 -> 下輪複用: Scheduled Task -> Run Record -> Memory Retention -> Reuse in the Next Run
定時任務把週期工作常駐化: Scheduled tasks make recurring work persistent
對話端承接真實用戶表達；企業端負責配置、運營和復盤。: Chat handles real user requests; the enterprise console handles configuration, operations, and review.
對話日誌記錄每輪輸入輸出: Conversation logs record the input and output of every turn.
發佈到廣場的知識庫，可複製到你的數字員工。: Knowledge bases published to the Marketplace can be copied to your digital employees.
反饋分析定位失敗原因: Use Feedback Analysis to Identify Failure Causes
反思輪數與單輪最大動作數必須是數字: Reflection rounds and maximum actions per turn must be numbers.
非 GET 請求會把這裡的 JSON 作為請求體發送；僅 URL 查詢串不會變成: For non-GET requests, this JSON is sent as the request body. URL query strings alone do not become a request body.
負責報銷核對、預算口徑、財務資料檢索和風險提示。: Responsible for Expense Verification, budget standards, finance knowledge retrieval and risk alerts.
負責會議紀要、資料歸檔、跨部門事務跟進和結果同步。: Responsible for Meeting Notes, Knowledge Archive, cross-team follow-up and result synchronization.
負責研發資料查詢、代碼任務拆解、SOP 執行和交付記錄沉澱。: Handles R&D knowledge lookup, code task breakdown, SOP execution, and delivery records.
負責知識庫檢索、資料結構化歸檔、信息核對和答案沉澱。: Handles knowledge retrieval, structured archiving, information verification, and answer retention.
該工具不是可新增候選: This tool is not an eligible candidate to add.
該任務沒有綁定數字員工，請新建任務後再發送: This task has no digital employee assigned. Create a new task before sending.
改寫失敗，當前草稿未變更。: Rewrite failed. The current draft is unchanged.
改寫失敗，已保留當前草稿: Rewrite failed. The current draft was retained.
概括這個數字員工的崗位邊界、服務風格和執行重點: Summarize this employee’s role boundaries, service style, and execution priorities.
崗位邊界清楚，知道它能處理什麼、不能處理什麼。: Clear role boundaries, knows what it can handle, what it cannot handle.
工具：參數 schema 可驗證，測試調用有結果。: Tool: parameter schema verifiable, Test Call has Result.
工具調用可驗證，參數和結果都能復盤。: Tool calls are verifiable, and their parameters and results can be reviewed.
工具沒有被調用怎麼辦？: What if a tool is not called?
功能開發時保持一個原則：配置變更要能被運行驗證，運行失敗要能被 Trace 解釋: Keep one principle during development: configuration changes must be runtime-verifiable, and failures must be explainable through Trace.
共 {1} 個引用來源，當前暫無可展示的桶級代表來源。: {1} citation sources in total. No representative bucket-level source is available to display.
構建前端，並掛載對話端、企業端和 API。: Build the frontend and mount Chat, the enterprise console, and the API.
廣場暫無可用數字員工: No digital employees are available in the Marketplace.
還沒有後續節點，請新增流轉規則。: There is no next node. Add a transition rule.
還有必填信息沒有收集到時進入: Enter when required information is still missing.
核心功能不是散點，而是一套員工運行系統: Core capabilities form one employee operating system, not isolated features.
換個關鍵詞，或切換員工分類再試試: Try another keyword or switch the employee category.
彙集所有可共享的 SOP、知識庫、技能和工具，新建數字員工時可以從這裡複製配置作: Collect all shared SOPs, knowledge bases, skills, and tools so new digital employees can copy them as a starting point.
幾步搭好你的數字員工: Build your digital employee in a few steps
記憶沉澱長期偏好和復盤結論: Memory Retains Long-term Preferences and Review Conclusions
技能說明、權限或運行配置有更新: Skill Description, permissions or runtime configuration has Update
技能運行超時，請檢查模型或稍後重試。: The Skill Run Timed Out. Check the Model or Try Again Later.
加載來源知識庫失敗: Failed to load source knowledge base
加載數字員工檔案失敗: Failed to load digital employee profile
加載知識發現建議失敗: Failed to load knowledge discovery suggestions
檢測到當前 SOP 有未保存變更。你可以先保存當前內容；清空後會進入新的 SOP: This SOP has unsaved changes. Save it first if needed. Clearing opens a new SOP draft workspace and does not replace the original SOP with an empty one.
檢查 API Key、Base URL 是否包含 `/v1`、模型 ID、餘額和: Check the API Key, whether Base URL includes `/v1`, the model ID, balance, and network. Make the default model test pass before validating chat.
檢查 SOP 節點 allowed_actions、工具啟用狀態、參數 sche: Check SOP node allowed_actions, tool enabled status, parameter schema, and current employee bindings.
檢查節點 instruction、expected_user_info 和槽位抽: Check node instruction, expected_user_info, and slot extraction so already satisfied information is skipped.
檢查文檔解析狀態、知識庫是否綁定到當前員工，以及問題是否覆蓋文檔中的關鍵概念。: Check document parsing, whether the knowledge base is bound to the current employee, and whether the question covers key document concepts.
簡單說明這個工具集的用途: Briefly describe this tool set’s purpose
將清空{1}，不會影響其他用戶。確定繼續？: This will clear {1}, without affecting other users. Continue?
接口連接失敗，請檢查本地服務或稍後重試: Endpoint Connection Failed. Check the Local Service or Try Again Later.
僅支持 .md、.doc、.docx、.txt 文件: Only supports. md, . doc, . docx, . txt File
開放廣場會永久刪除該知識庫及其文檔、內部索引、引用來源和版本記錄。: The Marketplace will permanently delete this knowledge base, including documents, internal indexes, citations, and version history.
開啟後，其他賬號可以在對話端和數字員工廣場中選擇這個員工。: When enabled, other accounts can select this employee in Chat and the Digital Employee Marketplace.
可補充任務目的、範圍或結果要求: Optionally add the task purpose, scope, or result requirements.
可讀知識頁，用於長期沉澱、跨文檔綜合和數字員工複製。: Readable Knowledge Page, for long-term retention, cross-document synthesis and Digital Employee Copy.
可複製到當前數字員工的技能。: Skills that can be copied to the current digital employee.
可複製和複用的業務流程與執行規範。: Reusable Business Workflows and Execution Standards.
可開放給員工調用和測試的工具能力。: Available to employees Call and Test Tool Capabilities.
可配置到員工工具的工具。: Tools that can be configured for an employee.
可選，參考文檔或項目主頁: Optional, reference document or project home page
可選，用於說明這個定時任務的來源和目的: Optional. Describe the source and purpose of this scheduled task.
控制一次用戶輸入內員工可連續決策和調用工具的最大次數，用於避免無限循環。: Limit how many consecutive decisions and tool calls an employee can make for one user input to prevent infinite loops.
例如 天氣查詢、代碼審查: For example Weather Query, Code Review
例如 研發工程師、財務助理: For example: R&D Engineer or Finance Assistant
例如 alchaincyf/nuwa-skill 或 https://githu: For example alchaincyf/nuwa-skill or https: //github. com/owner/repo/tree/main/skill
例如：每日交付質量復盤: For example: Daily Delivery Quality Review
例如：請補充需要校驗的報文內容。: For example: provide the payload that needs validation.
例如：信息完整後繼續: For example: continue after all information is complete.
連接 MCP Server，自動發現並同步其工具集: Connect MCP Server, automatically Discover and Sync its Tool Set
瀏覽器、MCP、查詢工具等可複用能力。: Reusable browser, MCP, and query capabilities.
流程能跳過已滿足信息，並在關鍵動作前確認。: The flow skips information already provided and asks for confirmation before critical actions.
留空表示所有技能可調用，多個技能用英文逗號分隔。: Leave blank to allow all skills. Separate multiple skills with commas.
沒有讀取到可導入的技能文件: No importable skill files were found.
沒有可複製的 SOP: No SOPs are available to copy.
沒有可複製的工具: No tools are available to copy.
沒有可複製的技能: No skills are available to copy.
沒有可複製的知識庫: No knowledge bases are available to copy.
沒有可清空的記憶: There is no memory to clear.
每次新增一個動作；點擊已有動作可重新選擇。: Add one action at a time. Click an existing action to choose again.
每次執行時交給員工的任務: Task assigned to the employee for each run
每個員工獨立維護崗位描述、服務範圍、資源綁定和運營記錄，適合把客服、導購、運營、: Each employee maintains its own role description, service scope, resource bindings, and operations history, separating support, commerce, operations, and knowledge roles.
描述員工每次執行時需要做什麼，可以包含拆解要求、輸出格式和注意事項。: Describe what the employee should do each run, including breakdown requirements, output format, and notes.
模型、員工、知識庫、技能、SOP、工具、定時任務共同定義員工能力。: Models, employees, knowledge bases, skills, SOPs, tools, and scheduled tasks define employee capabilities together.
模型：默認模型唯一，測試連接成功，密鑰脫敏展示。: Model: one default model, successful connection test, and masked credentials.
模型測試失敗怎麼辦？: Model Test Failed What should I do?
模型從本次上傳的知識中發現了技能或工具草案，確認後才會寫入系統。: The model found skill or tool drafts in the uploaded knowledge. They are written only after confirmation.
模型理解：沒有額外限制，流程可以從這裡繼續。: Model interpretation: there are no additional restrictions, so the flow can continue from here.
默認使用 forbid 併發策略：上一輪未結束時跳過本次喚醒，避免同一員工重複處: The default forbid concurrency policy skips a wake-up while the previous run is active, preventing duplicate work by the same employee.
目錄索引，用於按資料、章節、主題逐級展開: A table of contents that expands knowledge by document, section, and topic.
你正在編輯現有技能。導入會進入新建狀態，不會覆蓋當前技能。: You are editing an existing skill. Importing starts a new item and does not overwrite the current skill.
配置 MCP Server 連接後，可發現其提供的工具並同步為工具集。: Configure an MCP Server connection to discover its tools and sync them as a tool set.
配置單個 HTTP 接口作為工具: Configure an HTTP Endpoint as a Tool
其下 {1} 個已導入工具將一併刪除，操作不可撤銷。: Its {1} imported tools will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
企業數字員工運行時，從配置到持續運營: Enterprise Digital Employee Runtime, from Configuration to Continuous Operations
啟動本地進程並通過標準輸入輸出通信: Start a local process and communicate through standard input and output.
前端已從事件日誌持續同步，但服務端沒有寫入完成事件。: The frontend kept syncing the event log, but the server did not write a completion event.
前往工具頁按現有流程配置和測試工具。: Go to the Tools page to configure and test tools with the current workflow.
清空只會進入一個新的 SOP 草稿工作臺，不會刪除或替換當前正在編輯的 SOP。: Clearing only opens a new SOP draft workspace. It does not delete or replace the SOP being edited.
請根據當前會話補充人工回覆。: Add a human reply based on the current conversation.
請輸入開源平臺地址、GitHub 倉庫或 SKILL.md 鏈接: Enter an Open-Source Platform URL, GitHub Repository, or SKILL.md Link
請輸入密碼（首次使用請輸入admin）: Enter Password (Use admin for first use)
請輸入要調試的知識問題: Enter a knowledge question to debug
請輸入賬號（首次使用請輸入admin）: Enter Account (Use admin for first use)
請先保存 MCP 服務器，才能導入並同步工具。: Save the MCP Server before importing and syncing tools.
請先保存 MCP 服務器，再同步工具: Save the MCP Server Before Syncing Tools
請先測試接口成功後再新增工具: Test the endpoint successfully before adding a tool.
請先創建或選擇一個數字員工，再複製工具: Create or Select a Digital Employee Before Copying a Tool
請先選擇一個數字員工，再從廣場複製 SOP: Select a Digital Employee, Then Copy an SOP from the Marketplace
請先選擇一個數字員工，再從廣場複製技能: Select a Digital Employee, Then Copy a Skill from the Marketplace
請先選擇一個數字員工，再從廣場複製知識庫: Select a Digital Employee, Then Copy a Knowledge Base from the Marketplace
請先選擇一個數字員工再配置定時任務。: Select a Digital Employee Before Configuring Scheduled Tasks.
請先選擇一個員工，再從廣場複製資源。: Select an Employee, Then Copy Resources from the Marketplace.
請選擇複製來源員工: Select the Source Employee to Copy
請選擇要複製的知識庫: Select a knowledge base to copy
請粘貼原始技能說明，或點擊右側某一塊後告訴我需要怎樣改寫。: Paste the original skill description, or select a section on the right and describe how it should be rewritten.
請至少選擇一個要導入的工具: Select at least one tool to import
缺少某個指定字段時進入: Enter when a specified field is missing
缺少樣例參數，無法測試接口: Example parameters are required to test the endpoint.
確認端口、健康檢查和日誌位置。: Confirm the port, health check, and log location.
讓 AI 員工可運營、可治理: Make AI Employees Operable and Governable
讓員工按一次性、每日、每週或每月計劃執行提示詞，適合巡檢、週報、提醒、異常跟進和: Run employee prompts once, daily, weekly, or monthly for inspections, reports, reminders, exception follow-up, and recurring analysis.
任務信息還在加載，請稍後再發送: Task information is still loading. Send again later.
刪除後，引用該工具的技能將無法繼續調用它，操作不可撤銷。: After deletion, skills that reference this tool can no longer call it. This action cannot be undone.
刪除後不會移除歷史對話記錄，但組織 SOP 列表中將不再顯示該流程。: Deletion keeps conversation history, but removes this flow from the organization SOP list.
刪除後不再喚醒該員工，歷史執行記錄會繼續保留。: Deletion stops waking this employee while preserving historical execution records.
刪除後該廣場內容會從開放平臺移除，已複製到員工側的引用可能不再可同步。: This removes the Marketplace item from the open platform. Copies on employees may no longer synchronize.
刪除後該技能不會再出現在技能廣場中，此操作不可撤銷。: This skill will no longer appear in the Skill Marketplace. This action cannot be undone.
刪除後該技能不會再出現在組織技能庫中，此操作不可撤銷。: This skill will no longer appear in the organization skill library. This action cannot be undone.
刪除後該數字員工會從廣場和員工列表移除，相關資源綁定也會一併清理。: This removes the digital employee from the Marketplace and employee list and clears related resource bindings.
刪除後該員工的所有配置將一併移除，操作不可撤銷。: Deleting this employee also removes all of its configuration. This action cannot be undone.
刪除後該賬號無法登錄，但其創建的數字員工仍然保留。: This account can no longer log in, but digital employees it created are retained.
刪除後會同時移除所有連接到這個節點、或從這個節點發出的流轉規則。: Deleting this node also removes all incoming and outgoing transition rules.
刪除後無法恢復該會話及其消息記錄，確定繼續嗎？: This conversation and its messages cannot be recovered after deletion. Continue?
刪除後需要重新導入或手動新建該文件。: After deletion, re-import or manually recreate this file.
商品知識庫 -> 比價技能 -> 購買 SOP -> 工具結果反饋: Product Knowledge Base -> Price Comparison Skill -> Purchase SOP -> Tool Result Feedback
上傳後這裡會顯示原始資料、知識圖譜和引用來源入庫進度: After upload, this area shows ingestion progress for source material, the knowledge graph, and citations.
上傳文檔即創建知識庫: Upload a Document to Create a Knowledge Base
上傳業務文檔後，系統會先生成知識圖譜，再刷新目錄索引、引用來源與自發現建議。: After a business document is uploaded, the system builds the knowledge graph, then refreshes the table of contents, citations, and discovery suggestions.
上一步工具調用成功後進入: Enter after the previous tool call succeeds
上一步工具調用失敗後進入: Enter after the previous tool call fails
設為 0 時關閉反思；每輪允許模型檢查當前技能和工具結果，並決定是否重試其他技能: Set to 0 to disable reflection. Each round lets the model review the current skill and tool results and decide whether to retry another skill or tool.
生成連接已斷開，後端任務仍可繼續。: The generation connection was closed, but the backend task can continue.
生成失敗，當前草稿未變更。: Generation failed. The current draft is unchanged.
生成失敗，已保留當前草稿: Generation failed. The current draft was retained.
使用內置的 builtin.demo MCP，僅用於演示: Use the built-in builtin. demo MCP for demonstration only
適合瀏覽器驗證和長時間演示。: Suitable for browser validation and long-running demos.
釋放以導入 SKILL.md、zip 技能包或完整技能文件夾: Drop to Import SKILL.md, a ZIP Skill Package, or a Complete Skill Folder
售後 SOP -> 訂單查詢工具 -> 風險回覆規則 -> Trace 復盤: After-sales SOP -> Order Lookup Tool -> risk response rules -> Trace Review
輸入或粘貼需要整理的 SOP 流程說明: Enter or paste the SOP workflow description to organize.
輸入僅當前員工可見的崗位人設: Enter a role persona visible only to the current employee
Type a message and press Enter to send...
說明你要如何改寫右側選中的部分: Describe how to rewrite the selected section on the right
說明這個節點要完成的目標。: Describe the goal this node must complete.
說明這個知識圖譜沉澱了什麼知識: Describe the knowledge captured by this graph
搜索 SOP 名稱、ID、業務域: Search SOP Name, ID, business domain
搜索工具名稱、描述、URL 或分桶: Search Tool Name, Description, URL or Bucket
搜索技能名稱、Slug、描述或主頁: Search skill name, Slug, description, or home page
搜索名稱、模型、Provider 或 Base URL: Search Name, Model, Provider or Base URL
搜索知識庫名稱、描述、狀態或版本: Search Knowledge Base Name, Description, Status or Version
所有必填信息都收集完成後進入: Enter after all required information is collected
所有工具建議已拒絕，SOP 草稿未變更: All tool suggestions were rejected. The SOP draft is unchanged.
填寫技能定義並編輯 SKILL.md，保存後可在右側運行測試。: Complete the Skill Definition and Edit SKILL.md. After Saving, Run a Test on the Right.
停用後其下工具將無法被員工調用。: When disabled, its tools cannot be called by employees.
停用後員工將無法調用該工具。: When disabled, employees cannot call this tool.
停止腳本託管的本地進程。: Stop the local process managed by the script.
通過 HTTP 工具和內置工具連接訂單、商品、知識檢索或內部服務，讓員工可以查詢: Use HTTP and built-in tools to connect orders, products, knowledge retrieval, or internal services so employees can query, validate, create, and trigger actions.
通過 HTTP(S) 連接遠程 MCP Server: Connect to a remote MCP Server over HTTP(S)
通過 Server-Sent Events 連接遠程 MCP Server: Connect to a remote MCP Server through Server-Sent Events
通過 Trace、反饋、記憶和定時任務沉澱失敗原因、穩定口徑和長期任務。: Use Trace, feedback, memory, and scheduled tasks to retain failure reasons, stable standards, and long-running work.
通過商品知識庫、比價技能和購買工具，完成推薦、價格解釋、下單確認和結果反饋。: Combine product knowledge, price-comparison skills, and purchase tools for recommendations, price explanations, order confirmation, and result feedback.
頭像會顯示在我的數字員工、數字員工檔案頁和對話端的員工選擇中。: The avatar appears in My Digital Employees, Employee Profile, and the employee picker in Chat.
推薦單端口啟動：企業端、對話端和 API 文檔都由同一個 FastAPI 進程掛: Recommended single-port startup: the console, chat, and API docs are mounted by one FastAPI process for local demos and external tunnel testing.
退款、退貨、換貨流程需要確認訂單、查詢資格、收集原因並控制承諾邊界，是最適合驗證: Refund, return, and exchange flows require order confirmation, eligibility checks, reason collection, and controlled commitments, making them ideal for validating SOPs and tool calls.
拖拽文檔到這裡，或點擊上傳: Drag a document here or click to upload
完整排行：當前版本差評率: Full Ranking: Current Version Negative Rate
完整排行：當前版本好評率: Full Ranking: Current Version Positive Rate
維護當前數字員工的知識庫、知識圖譜與檢索調試。: Manage the current employee's knowledge bases, knowledge graph, and retrieval debugging.
維護當前數字員工技能的定義、文件包和運行測試。: Maintain the current employee’s skill definition, file package, and runtime tests.
維護技能廣場中的技能定義、文件包和運行測試。: Maintain skill definitions, file packages, and runtime tests in the Skill Marketplace.
維護知識庫廣場中的知識庫、知識圖譜與檢索調試。: Manage marketplace knowledge bases, knowledge graphs, and retrieval debugging.
為當前數字員工創建技能，填寫基本信息並編輯技能文件。: Create a skill for the current employee, complete its basic information, and edit its files.
未找到要編輯的技能: The skill to edit was not found.
文件還在解析中，請稍後發送: The file is still being parsed. Send again later.
文件夾中沒有找到 SKILL.md: SKILL.md was not found in the folder.
無需保存，直接用當前配置測試連接。: No need to save. Test the connection with the current configuration.
系統可啟動、頁面可訪問、模型可用於生成。: The system starts, pages are accessible, and the model can generate output.
先從低風險、高流程密度、可復盤的任務開始，再逐步接入更強工具和更高風險動作。: Start with low-risk, process-heavy, reviewable tasks, then gradually connect stronger tools and higher-risk actions.
先選一個低風險但流程密集的崗位，例如售後服務、導購、運營巡檢或內部知識助手。: Choose a low-risk, process-heavy role first, such as after-sales support, commerce assistant, operations inspection, or internal knowledge assistant.
新增工具或更新 SOP 失敗: Failed to Add Tool or Update SOP
修改工具定義，並在右側驗證當前配置或已保存版本。: Edit the tool definition and validate the current configuration or saved version on the right.
選擇工具類型並填寫定義，可先用右側探測區測試請求與返回結構。: Select a tool type and complete its definition. Use the probe panel on the right to test request and response structures first.
選擇或拖入知識庫備份包（.zip）: Select or drop a knowledge base backup package (.zip).
選擇一個適合崗位的默認頭像。: Select a default avatar suitable for the role.
選擇一個數字員工查看能力、崗位和服務範圍。: Select a digital employee to view capabilities, role, and service scope.
選擇知識庫後查看文檔卡片、知識索引和知識圖譜: Select a knowledge base to view document cards, indexes, and the knowledge graph.
一次測試能變成下一輪配置改進。: Each test can improve the next configuration.
一個文件對應一份獨立知識庫；回到知識庫後可查看文檔卡片、知識索引和知識圖譜。: Each file creates an independent knowledge base. Return to the knowledge base to view document cards, indexes, and the knowledge graph.
一條業務請求如何被推進: How a business request moves forward
已創建獨立任務會話，後臺開始執行: Created an independent task conversation; background execution started
已創建知識庫和入庫任務: Created Knowledge Base and Ingestion Task
已存在同名文件: A file with the same name already exists
已發佈到廣場，可在對話端直接使用。: Published to the Marketplace and available directly in Chat.
已回覆，原會話會繼續執行: Response, original conversation will Continue Execute
排隊內容過大，刷新頁面後可能無法恢復: The queued content is too large to restore after a page refresh
已加載「{1}」。你可以在右側選擇一個或多個區域，然後在這裡描述需要怎樣改寫。: Loaded “{1}”. Select one or more sections on the right, then describe how they should be rewritten.
已確認 {1} 個工具，當前草稿已局部更新: Confirmed {1} tools. The current draft was partially updated.
已確認，等待其他工具建議處理完成後統一更新 SOP: Confirmed. The SOP will update after all other tool suggestions are resolved.
已刪除的定時任務不能重新啟用: Deleted scheduled tasks cannot be re-enabled
已生成「{1}」草稿。你可以在右側選擇一個或多個區域繼續改寫。: Generated the “{1}” draft. Select one or more sections on the right to continue rewriting.
已完成的定時任務可編輯後重新啟用: Completed scheduled tasks can be edited and re-enabled.
以當前數字員工的口吻回覆。提交後，原會話會繼續推進 SOP 流程。: Reply in the current digital employee’s voice. After submission, the original conversation resumes its SOP flow.
用測試參數直接調用已保存工具，檢查員工後續調用時的實際返回。: Call the saved tool with test parameters to verify what the employee will receive during later calls.
用對話日誌、Trace、反饋分析和事件記錄串起路由、工具調用、回覆與改進線索，失: Connect routing, tool calls, replies, and improvement evidence with conversation logs, Trace, feedback analysis, and events so failures can be located precisely.
用戶明確拒絕後進入: Enter after the user explicitly declines
用戶明確確認後進入: Enter after the user explicitly confirms
用戶選擇了創建定時任務模式: User Select Create Scheduled Task Mode
用節點、必填信息、允許動作、中斷策略和回覆規則描述流程；已滿足的信息不重複追問，: Describe flows with nodes, required information, allowed actions, interruption policy, and response rules. Do not ask again for information already provided.
用一句話描述，例如：報文已獲取後進入: Describe it in one sentence, for example: enter after the payload is received.
用一句話描述什麼時候進入，例如：用戶已經提供商品名稱後進入: Describe when to enter in one sentence, for example: enter after the user provides a product name.
用於檢查當前知識庫的知識圖譜結構，發現斷鏈、孤立頁、重複主題等問題。檢查結果僅作: Inspect the current knowledge graph for broken links, isolated pages, and duplicate topics. Results are advisory and do not modify data.
用於路由和接口路徑，例如 weather-zh: Used for routing and endpoint paths, for example: weather-zh.
用於數字員工檔案頁頂部展示的 system prompt 摘要: System prompt summary shown at the top of the digital employee profile
用於員工選擇技能時的說明: Description Shown When Employees Select This Skill
右側已更新預覽，等待確認或拒絕: Preview updated on the right; awaiting confirmation or rejection
員工：崗位邊界明確，資源綁定清楚，狀態可管理。: Employee: clear role boundaries, explicit resource bindings, and manageable status.
員工能按業務規則推進，而不是自由發揮。: Employees follow business rules instead of improvising.
員工在對話中的角色、人設、回覆風格和執行邊界: The employee’s role, persona, response style, and execution boundaries in conversations.
運行後將在這裡顯示回覆、執行流程、代碼和輸出: After running, replies, execution steps, code, and output appear here.
運行流已結束，但未收到最終結果: The run stream ended without a final result.
運營：日誌、Trace、反饋、記憶能形成閉環。: Operations: logs, Trace, feedback, and memory form a closed loop.
在左側輸入說明或上傳文檔後開始生成: Enter instructions or upload a document on the left to start generation.
暫無 SOP，點擊「新增」創建一個吧: No SOPs Yet. Click "Add" to Create One.
暫無工具，點擊「新增」創建一個吧: No Tools Yet. Click "Add" to Create One.
暫無技能，點擊「新增」創建一個吧: No Skills Yet. Click "Add" to Create One.
暫無可讀代表來源: No readable representative source is available.
暫無可展示的切片正文，可點擊編輯加載完整引用來源。: No chunk text is available to display. Click Edit to load the full citation source.
暫無模型，點擊「新建模型」添加一個吧: No Models Yet. Click "New Model" to Add One.
暫無知識庫，點擊「新增」創建一個吧: No Knowledge Bases Yet. Click "Add" to Create One.
這不是單次 demo，而是一條最短運營閉環：配置、驗證、復盤、沉澱。: This is not a one-off demo. It is the shortest operating loop: configure, validate, review, and retain.
這個動作已經添加過了: This action has already been added
這會把當前數字員工的本地版本發佈為廣場可複用的 SOP 新版本。: This publishes the current employee’s local version as a reusable new SOP version in the Marketplace.
這些不是跳轉入口，而是配置時應當檢查的對象和驗收標準。: These are configuration checks and acceptance criteria, not navigation shortcuts.
這隻會在當前數字員工中隱藏該 SOP；開放廣場和其他數字員工仍然保留。: This only hides the SOP for the current employee. The Marketplace and other employees keep it.
這隻會在當前數字員工中隱藏該技能；開放廣場和其他數字員工仍然保留。: This only hides the skill for the current employee. The Marketplace and other employees keep it.
這隻會在當前數字員工中隱藏該知識庫；開放廣場和其他數字員工仍然保留。: This only hides the knowledge base for the current employee. The Marketplace and other employees keep it.
真正能落地的企業 AI，需要知道它做了什麼、為什麼這麼做、哪裡失敗、下一次如何改: Production enterprise AI must show what it did, why it did it, where it failed, and how to improve next time.
Retrieving through the table of contents and knowledge graph, then organizing citation sources...
正在理解技能目標與輸入信息: Understand Skill Target and Input Information
支持 doc/docx/txt/md/html/pdf；舊版 doc 會提示轉換: Supports doc, docx, txt, md, html, and pdf. Legacy doc files must be converted to docx.
支持常見圖片格式，會自動裁剪為方形頭像。: Common image formats are supported and automatically cropped to a square avatar.
支持開源平臺地址、GitHub repo/tree/raw SKILL.md 或: Supports open-source platform URLs, GitHub repo/tree/raw SKILL.md URLs, and owner/repo format. Import local zip or Markdown files from “Import > Select File” on the edit page.
知識：文檔解析完成，能命中引用，口徑可複查。: Knowledge: documents are parsed, citations can be retrieved, and standards can be reviewed.
知識庫 -> 引用回覆 -> 反饋分析 -> 知識更新: Knowledge Base -> Citation Response -> Feedback Analysis -> Knowledge Update
知識庫沒有引用怎麼辦？: Knowledge Baseno Citation What should I do?
知識圖譜以結構化文本保存，標題和摘要會同步寫入內容。: Knowledge graphs are stored as structured text, with title and summary synchronized into the content.
知識引用、長期記憶、會話狀態和反饋結果進入下一次決策。: Knowledge citations, long-term memory, conversation state, and feedback feed the next decision.
只給員工接入它真正需要的工具，例如訂單查詢、商品購買、內部查詢或知識檢索。: Connect only the tools an employee truly needs, such as order lookup, product purchase, internal queries, or knowledge retrieval.
只有管理員可以編輯技能廣場內容: Only administrators can edit Skill Marketplace content.
至少需要保留一個節點: At least one node is required.
重新編輯會回到這條消息發送前的 SOP 草稿，並截斷之後的推理記錄。: Editing again restores the SOP draft from before this message and removes subsequent reasoning records.
週期巡檢、週報、異常提醒和待辦跟進可以配置為定時任務，讓員工在後臺持續推進。: Configure inspections, weekly reports, exception reminders, and follow-ups as scheduled tasks so employees can keep working in the background.
準備 OpenAI 兼容模型、單端口服務和 demo 租戶數據，讓企業端、對話端: Prepare an OpenAI-compatible model, single-port service, and demo tenant data so the console, chat, and API docs run from one local entry point.
最底層可讀知識頁，回答時基於頁面內容並追溯引用來源: The lowest-level readable knowledge page, used to answer from page content with traceable citations.
作為唯一標識，僅支持字母/數字/下劃線；中文將自動轉拼音，最長 15 字符。: Unique identifier. Supports letters, numbers, and underscores. Chinese is converted to pinyin, up to 15 characters.
Enter 發送 / Shift+Enter 換行: Enter to send / Shift+Enter for a new line
GET 會把這裡的字段作為查詢參數追加到 URL；參數值填寫未編碼原文，例如 t: GET appends these fields to the URL as query parameters. Enter unencoded values, for example Asia/Shanghai for timezone.
Headers 或 Env 不是合法 JSON: Headers or Env is not valid JSON.
JSON 配置格式不正確，請檢查 Headers、Auth、Schema 或 M: The JSON configuration is invalid. Check Headers, Auth, Schema, or MCP Config.
PilotDeck 把能力分成 WorkSpace、Router、Memory、: PilotDeck groups capabilities into WorkSpace, Router, Memory, Always On, and Gateway. StaffDeck applies them to enterprise digital employees with role boundaries, knowledge governance, workflow execution, tool calls, and operational review.
Router、Agent Loop、Skill Runtime 和 Respon: Router, Agent Loop, Skill Runtime and Response Generator Advance Task.
SKILL.md 是技能入口，不能刪除: SKILL.md is the skill entry point and cannot be deleted.
SOP 為什麼重複追問？: Why does the SOP repeat follow-up questions?
SOP 已保存，當前改寫已清空: SOP Saved and the Current Rewrite Was Cleared
SOP ID 已存在，已另存為 {1}: The SOP ID already exists and was saved as {1}
SOP：節點、槽位、允許動作和回覆規則明確。: SOP: Nodes, Slots, Allowed Actions, and Response Rules Are Clearly Defined.
Temperature 與 Max Tokens 必須是數字: Temperature and Max Tokens must be numeric
Trace 展示路由、槽位和工具調用: Trace Shows Routing, Slots, and Tool Calls
Trace、事件日誌和反饋分析讓每次執行都能被追蹤和改進。: Trace, event logs, and feedback analysis make every execution traceable and improvable.
StaffDeck 把模型、數字員工、知識庫、技能、SOP、工具、記憶、定時任務: StaffDeck connects models, digital employees, knowledge bases, skills, SOPs, tools, memory, scheduled tasks, and Trace into a configurable, verifiable, and reviewable business conversation system.
StaffDeck 的對話不是單輪問答。它會在路由、知識、技能、SOP、工具和回: StaffDeck conversations are not single-turn Q&A. They form a traceable execution chain across routing, knowledge, skills, SOPs, tools, and response generation.
StaffDeck 的核心不是“能聊天”，而是讓一個真實崗位擁有自己的配置、資源: StaffDeck is not just chat. It gives a real role its own configuration, resources, execution rules, and operations history. Each employee has independent knowledge, SOPs, tools, and memory, and every conversation can be reviewed end to end.
URL 已包含查詢參數時請把 HTTP Method 切換為 GET；POST: If the URL already contains query parameters, switch HTTP Method to GET. POST sends test parameters as a JSON body.
待回答會話僅支持發送人工回覆: Awaiting-reply conversations only accept human replies
待回答暫不支持附件，請發送文字回覆: Attachments are not supported for awaiting replies; send a text reply instead
當前賬號不能直接向該會話發送消息，請從待回答列表回覆: This account cannot message the conversation directly; reply from the Awaiting Reply list
任務信息還在加載，請稍後再發送: Task details are still loading; try sending again shortly
還沒有可用模型配置，數字員工暫不能調用模型。請先完成模型配置。: No usable model configuration is available, so digital employees cannot call a model yet. Please configure a model first.
系統管理員尚未配置可用模型，數字員工暫不能調用模型。請聯繫管理員完成模型配置。: The system administrator has not configured an available model, so digital employees cannot call a model yet. Please contact an administrator to complete model configuration.
還沒有可用模型配置，發送消息前請先完成模型配置。: No usable model configuration is available. Please configure a model before sending messages.
系統管理員尚未配置可用模型，暫時無法發送消息。請聯繫管理員完成模型配置。: The system administrator has not configured an available model, so messages cannot be sent yet. Please contact an administrator to complete model configuration.
模型配置正在加載，請稍後再發送: Model configuration is still loading. Please try sending again shortly.
無法讀取模型配置，請刷新頁面後重試: Unable to load model configuration. Please refresh the page and try again.
系統管理員尚未配置可用模型，請聯繫管理員完成模型配置: The system administrator has not configured an available model. Please contact an administrator to complete model configuration.
請填寫配置名稱、Provider 和 Model: Enter a configuration name, Provider, and Model
模型連接失敗，請檢查配置後重試。: Model connection failed. Check the configuration and try again.
模型保存或連接測試失敗，請檢查配置後重試。: Model saving or connection test failed. Check the configuration and try again.
當前沒有可用模型。完成配置並通過連通性測試後，才能發送對話和執行任務。: No usable model is available. After the configuration passes the connection test, you can send chats and run tasks.
當前賬號沒有模型管理權限，請聯繫管理員完成模型配置和連通性測試。: This account does not have model management permission. Contact an administrator to configure and test the model.
